understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver selectable pieces (P and S) onto goal positions (+) within a limited step budget, likely by pushing blocks or navigating around walls.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shifts the selected piece but fails silently if blocked by walls, boundaries, or other objects; pushable blocks (B) can be shifted if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK switches control between multiple selectable pieces (S) at exact pixel positions without consuming movement progress toward goals. Walls (#) block movement variably, and repeated failed moves or unnecessary switching wastes the strict steps_remaining budget.
